scripts.build: pnpm --filter @guanmao/shared build && pnpm --filter @guanmao/agent build && pnpm --filter @guanmao/server build && pnpm --filter @guanmao/web build && pnpm --filter @guanmao/cli build && pnpm --filter @guanmao/desktop-ui build && pnpm build:desktop:go
scripts.clean:node_modules: rm -rf node_modules && pnpm -r exec -- rm -rf node_modules
scripts.dev:server: pnpm --filter @guanmao/shared build && pnpm --filter @guanmao/agent build && pnpm --filter @guanmao/server dev
scripts.dev:web: pnpm --filter @guanmao/shared build && pnpm --filter @guanmao/agent build && pnpm --filter @guanmao/web dev
scripts.dev:cli: pnpm --filter @guanmao/shared build && pnpm --filter @guanmao/agent build && pnpm --filter @guanmao/cli dev
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @guanmao/shared build && pnpm --filter @guanmao/agent build && pnpm --filter @guanmao/server typecheck && pnpm --filter @guanmao/web typecheck && pnpm --filter @guanmao/cli typecheck && pnpm --filter @guanmao/desktop-ui typecheck
